name: Mimikatz Module Load
description: Detects a process loading a module name associated with credential-dumping tooling.

name: LSASS Memory Access By Unsigned Process
description: Detects an unsigned process opening a handle to lsass.exe memory.

name: DNS Query To Newly Registered Domain
description: Detects DNS resolution of a domain registered within the last 24 hours.

name: Excessive Outbound Connections From Workstation
description: Identifies a host opening an abnormal number of outbound connections in a short window.
